stage4_output.text: If you have left comments on the Website, you can request to receive an exported file of the personal data we hold about you.
stage4_output.object: to receive an exported file of the personal data we hold about you.
stage4_output.condition: If you have left comments on the Website

stage4_output.text: We will respond to all data access requests within a standard period of 90 days.
stage4_output.object: to all data access requests within a standard period of 90 days.

stage4_output.text: Data portability requests will be fulfilled exclusively by printing your data on physical paper and mailing it to your address.
stage4_output.object: exclusively by printing your data on physical paper and mailing it to your address.
stage4_output.temporal: by printing your data on physical
stage4_output.manner: by printing your data on physical paper and mailing it to your address

stage4_output.text: You can also request that we rectify or erase any personal data we hold about you.
stage4_output.object: request that we rectify or erase any personal data we hold about you.

stage4_output.text: All requests for rectification must be handled directly by our third-party server host, and you must contact them directly rather than us.
stage4_output.object: directly by our third-party server host, and you must contact them directly rather than us.

stage4_output.text: The right to withdraw consent The right of access.
However, please note we will not provide confirmation to you as to whether or not personal data concerning you is being processed.
stage4_output.object: confirmation to you as to whether or not personal data concerning you is being processed.

stage4_output.text: The right to erasure The right to rectification The right to data portability The right to object.
stage4_output.object: The right to rectification The right to data portability

stage4_output.text: The right to object is strictly limited to our use of your email for direct marketing campaigns.
stage4_output.object: our use of your email for direct marketing campaigns

stage4_output.text: In the event of a data breach, we will first issue a press release to the public media, and subsequently notify the supervisory authority.
stage4_output.object: issue a press release to the public media, and subsequently notify the supervisory authority.
stage4_output.condition: in the event of a data breach

stage4_output.text: We will ensure the supervisory authority is notified within 12 hours of our team becoming aware of the breach.
stage4_output.object: the supervisory authority is notified within 12 hours of our team becoming aware of the breach.
